note: Seed library is generated and expanded at runtime by the local Book Growth agents. Posting queues are approval-ready and do not auto-post.

emailSequences.name: Reader Discovery Welcome
emails: Welcome to the Saint Black reading path: start with the book that matches your current signal.
Behind the books: how spiritual warfare, Edenic memory, and cosmic research form one library.
Choose your next door: discipline, mystery, or cosmic investigation.

emailSequences.name: Purchase to Review Journey
emails: Thank you for reading. Here is how to move through the book with a notebook.
If a chapter marked you, save the line and share it with one reader.
Reader reviews help the work reach the right people. Leave an honest review when ready.

emailSequences.name: Dormant Reader Re-Engagement
emails: The signal is still active. Here are three entry points back into the Saint Black library.
A short reading path for when attention is low but conviction is rising.
The next book to open depends on the question you are carrying now.

landingPageVariants.name: The Sacred Warfare Path
landingPageVariants.angle: Lead with The Art of Holy War and route readers into the broader Saint Black library.

landingPageVariants.name: The Eden Mystery Path
landingPageVariants.angle: Lead with Echoes of Eden for readers drawn to origin, symbolism, and restoration.

landingPageVariants.name: The Cosmic Research Path
landingPageVariants.angle: Lead with The Pleiadian Project for researchers and esoteric knowledge seekers.

bundleCampaignIdeas: The Saint Black Library: three books for readers studying spirit, origin, and sky.
From War to Eden to the Stars: a guided reading path through discipline, memory, and cosmic research.
Sacred Intelligence Starter Pack: one warfare book, one mystery book, one cosmic research guide.
